---
title: "Consulting"
page-layout: full
toc: false
editor: visual
---

I offer consulting services in three areas where I bring deep, detail-oriented expertise from a career spanning industry, academic research, open science, and co-founding a startup at the intersection of microbiome science and human health. My expertise spans microbiology, multi-omics and bioinformatics, and open science. 

If any of the areas below sound like a fit or to discuss a project, please reach out via the email address on my [contact page](contact.qmd) with a brief description of what you're looking for, and I'll follow up to talk through scope and fit.

```{=html}
<div class="consult-grid">

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="consult-icon" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"></circle>
        <line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"></line>
        <line x1="8" y1="13" x2="8" y2="11"></line>
        <line x1="11" y1="13" x2="11" y2="8"></line>
        <line x1="14" y1="13" x2="14" y2="10"></line>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <h3 class="consult-title">Investment Due Diligence</h3>
    <p class="consult-desc">Scientific and technical diligence on microbiology & 'omics biotech opportunities. </p>
  </div>

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="consult-icon" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M12 2C18 5 18 7 12 12C6 17 6 19 12 22"></path>
        <path d="M12 2C6 5 6 7 12 12C18 17 18 19 12 22"></path>
        <line x1="9.4" y1="5" x2="14.6" y2="5"></line>
        <line x1="8.8" y1="8.5" x2="15.2" y2="8.5"></line>
        <line x1="8.8" y1="15.5" x2="15.2" y2="15.5"></line>
        <line x1="9.4" y1="19" x2="14.6" y2="19"></line>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <h3 class="consult-title">Bioinformatics</h3>
    <p class="consult-desc">Multi-omics analysis of microbial systems, including human microbiome studies and complex environments. Build reproducible, open computational pipelines and infrastructure setup for early-stage companies.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="consult-icon" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path>
        <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"></polyline>
        <line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"></line>
        <line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"></line>
        <line x1="10" y1="9" x2="8" y2="9"></line>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <h3 class="consult-title">Grant Writing</h3>
    <p class="consult-desc">Drafting, structuring, and sharpening proposals so the science, innovation, and impact come through clearly — including pre-submission review and well-scoped aims.</p>
  </div>

</div>

<style>
.consult-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
  grid-auto-rows: 1fr;
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
}
.consult-card {
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 240px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1.75rem 1.5rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.25);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.06);
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}
.consult-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  border-color: var(--bs-primary, #2780e3);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
}
.consult-icon {
  color: var(--bs-primary, #2780e3);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.consult-icon svg { width: 52px; height: 52px; }
.consult-title { margin: 0 0 0.6rem; font-size: 1.15rem; }
.consult-desc { margin: 0; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.5; opacity: 0.85; }

/* Single column on small screens; let height follow content */
@media (max-width: 575px) {
  .consult-grid { grid-auto-rows: auto; }
}
</style>
```
